# Vantage

> AI job preparation tool. Upload your CV, paste a job link, get the full prep pack in ~90 seconds: company intel, tailored cover letter, interview questions + mock drill, CV fit score, and a 5-minute interview pitch.

Vantage is built for people applying to many jobs a week who can't afford to burn two hours researching each company, writing a custom cover letter, and guessing interview questions. One upload, one link, full prep pack.

## Operator identity

Vantage AI at aimvantage.uk is operated by **Giovanni Sizino Ennes**, a UK-based independent founder (sole trader). Not a registered limited company. Direct contact: giovanni.sizino.ennes@hotmail.co.uk. Full transparency page: https://aimvantage.uk/about. Vantage AI is NOT affiliated with Vantage Recruitment, Vantage Consulting, AI-Vantage Training, Vantagepoint AI, or any similarly named organisation. Vantage AI does not recruit, does not contact users on WhatsApp/Telegram/SMS, and does not charge upfront "processing" or "DBS" fees. All billing runs through Stripe Checkout.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://aimvantage.uk/): What Vantage is, how it works, testimonials, pricing overview.
- [Pricing](https://aimvantage.uk/pricing): Starter £5/$5 = 20 prep packs (one-time, never expire). Pro £12/$15 = 60 prep packs/month. Premium £20/$25 = 120 prep packs/month. 1 token = 1 full analysis. 10 free tokens on signup, no card required.
- [Register](https://aimvantage.uk/register): Create a free account to start using Vantage.

## Free tools (no signup)

- [Cover Letter Roast](https://aimvantage.uk/roast): Free AI tool that roasts your cover letter — savage but constructive feedback in 10 seconds. Quotes your actual worst lines, names the cliché, and gives the better swap. Severity score 1-5. Nothing stored.
- [Rejection Email Decoder](https://aimvantage.uk/decode-rejection): Free AI tool that translates job-rejection emails into what the recruiter actually meant. 10 verdict categories (boilerplate ghosting, ATS-filtered, salary misaligned, experience gap, internal hire, etc), severity score 1-5, the specific quoted phrases that gave each verdict away, and a concrete next move. Built 2026-05-08.
- [Ghost Job Detector](https://aimvantage.uk/ghost-job-check): Free AI tool that scores job listings for ghost-job probability (0-100). Flags cliché phrases ('highly motivated', 'self-starter'), suspiciously wide salary bands, multiple-seniority-in-one-role posts, missing tech stack on tech roles, generic team-intro fluff. Returns the specific tells quoted from the listing + your concrete next move. Built 2026-05-08.
- [Free ATS Keyword Scanner](https://aimvantage.uk/ats/scanner): Free in-browser keyword scanner. Paste your CV and a JD, see matched and missing keywords + a real (not invented) coverage percentage. Runs entirely client-side; nothing uploaded, no signup. Built 2026-05-10. Distinct from the per-vendor ATS guide at /ats which explains how Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, Taleo, and iCIMS each parse CVs.
- [Free JD Decoder](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/jd-decoder): Free in-browser job-description analyser. Paste any JD, get the hidden seniority signals, ghost-job risk, remote-vs-hybrid camouflage, ATS hints, scope red flags, and the interview rounds you should expect. Pure client-side regex pattern detection across 8 dimensions. Every flag links to its source phrase. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free CV Bullet Rewriter](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/bullet-rewriter): Free in-browser CV bullet improver. Paste one bullet, get a diagnosis (weak opening verbs, missing metrics, filler phrases like 'team player' / 'detail-oriented', responsibility-list framing, first-person pronouns, acronym density) plus 3 rewrite templates with examples. Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free 30-Day Post-Layoff Playbook Generator](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/layoff-playbook): Free in-browser personalised 30-day plan. Pick your role, country, severance status, visa, references — get a day-by-day playbook with the right specific action for each day. Markdown export so you can paste into Notion / Obsidian. Branches on visa status (H-1B 60-day clock, UK Skilled Worker, EU citizen). Pure client-side, no data leaves the browser. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Cover Letter A/B Comparator](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/cover-letter-compare): Free in-browser side-by-side cover letter scorer. Paste two drafts; get scoring across 8 dimensions (opening strength, metric count, filler phrases, passive voice, I/me/my ratio, specificity, length, total weighted score). Deterministic scoring, no LLM. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Salary Negotiation Script Generator](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/negotiation-script): Free in-browser negotiation script generator. Plug in offer details (base, signing, RSU) + target asks + competing-offer leverage. Get personalised email or phone-call script branched on tone (collaborative / firm) plus 7 talking points (never accept on call, ask for 24h, "which has most flex" pivot, etc.). Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Job Offer Comparison Calculator](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/offer-compare): Free 4-year side-by-side total comp calculator. Compare 2 offers across base + bonus % + signing + RSU + refresh % + PTO + remote. Discounts public RSU 10-20% for stock-price risk, private equity 35-55% for illiquidity. Outputs year-by-year breakdown + winner + warnings + insights. Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Reference Call Brief Generator](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/reference-brief): Free in-browser reference call brief generator. Add references with relationship type (current manager / past peer / direct report / client / cross-functional). Get a 1-page brief per reference: strengths to anchor on, 3 specific stories to have ready, likely questions by relationship type, what not to say, plus an email template to send 1-2 days before the call. Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Post-Interview Thank-You Note Generator](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/thank-you-note): Free in-browser tone-calibrated thank-you note. Pick tone (warm/direct/specific), round type (recruiter screen, hiring manager, technical, panel, final), sentiment (positive/neutral/concerned-about-a-moment), hours since call. Get a generated note anchored on a specific topic from your conversation, plus 7 sending tips (timing, recipient targeting, follow-up question handling, anti-template signals). Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free LinkedIn Headline + About Rewriter](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/linkedin-about): Free in-browser LinkedIn About + headline rewriter. Toggle between mode (headline ~120 chars / About section). Pick stance (open-to-work / employed-passive / building / consulting). Get 2-3 generated variants with rationale plus diagnosis of weak signals + 7 LinkedIn-specific tips. Branches on years experience and recent layoff company. Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Recruiter Cold-DM Reply Generator](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/recruiter-reply): Free in-browser calibrated reply generator for recruiter cold-DMs. Pick intent (interested / not now / not a fit / not sure), seniority alignment (matches / over-pitched / under-pitched), competing-activity flag. Get reply variants with rationale plus 7 tips (when to delay reply, when to ask for JD upfront, when to disclose competing offers, never-burn-bridges convention). Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Cold Email to Hiring Manager Generator](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/cold-email-hiring-manager): Free in-browser ATS-bypass cold email generator. Pick hook (mutual connection / recent post / specific product use / shared company history / public artefact / cold), stage (open application / after silent application / after rejection), fill in your value-prop sentence. Get 2-3 calibrated email variants plus 8 sending tips (best send times, subject-line length, attachment vs link, follow-up cadence). Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free STAR Story Builder](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/star-story-builder): Free in-browser STAR (Situation / Task / Action / Result) story builder. Plug in the four beats + what-you-learned, pick from 16 behavioural principles (Ownership / Bias for Action / Customer Obsession / Disagree-and-Commit / 12 more), get 3 calibrated variants (Classic STAR, Problem-led 45-second, Principle-calibrated). Each variant explains why it works for that principle's interview rubric. Plus 7 rehearsal tips. Aligns with State of 2026 finding that candidates need 8-10 stories with REAL FAILURES, not 4 polished ones. Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Glassdoor Review Decoder](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/glassdoor-decoder): Free in-browser pattern-matched red-flag decoder. Paste 5-10 Glassdoor reviews; get flags across 11 categories: burnout language, "fast-paced" HR-coded warning, micromanagement, bad leadership, high turnover, comp below market, layoff history, toxic culture markers, DEI imbalance, plus positive signals (genuine learning culture, real flexibility, reasonable comp). Each flag explains the coded language and why it matters. Pure client-side regex pattern detection (no LLM). Built 2026-05-10.
- [Free Career Risk Index](https://aimvantage.uk/tools/career-risk-index): Honest 6-axis weighted career-risk score (tenure stability 15%, runway buffer 30%, sector risk 15%, visa exposure 15%, AI exposure 15%, domain demand 10%) plus specific 30-day actions personalised to your situation. Each axis has a documented weight; the score is not invented. Branches on UK Tier 2 / US H-1B 60-day-clock visa specifics, sector volatility (AI labs lowest risk, seed startups highest), AI-replaceability of role. Boosts for confirmed references and public artefacts. Pure client-side. Built 2026-05-10.
- [CV Mirror](https://cv-mirror-web.vercel.app/): Free, fully client-side ATS scanner. Same team. Simulates how 5 real ATS systems (Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, Taleo, iCIMS) parse your CV — side by side. No signup, nothing uploads. Use it to fix CV parse issues before running a Vantage analysis.

## Vantage YouTube channel

Official Vantage AI YouTube channel — walkthroughs, comparisons, educational content. Faceless, AI-narrated, branded format.

- [Vantage YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuZxrV6LaJfGHsEvztsaB4Q): all walkthroughs and comparisons
- [Vantage AI Walk-Through — How It Works in 90 Seconds](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuZxrV6LaJfGHsEvztsaB4Q): full product walkthrough
- [Vantage AI vs Jobscan](https://youtu.be/gBWx5_q8lD4): side-by-side comparison covering scope, price, ATS scanning
- [What ATS parsers actually check on your CV in 2026](https://youtu.be/zuojMqNct_s): Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, Taleo, iCIMS quirks
- [Vantage AI pricing explained](https://youtu.be/iykHRLasQP8): tier breakdown and cost comparison vs alternatives
- [Vantage AI vs Final Round AI](https://youtu.be/hEnuW1xvBGk): ethical comparison — prep before vs coach during

Real Vantage usage stories. We do not publish fabricated case studies — placeholder URLs are clearly marked and excluded from the ItemList schema.

## Salary by role (UK + US, 2026)

Real percentile data sourced from BLS, ONS, ITJobsWatch, and Levels.fyi. No paywalled data, every number cited.

- [Salary hub](https://aimvantage.uk/salary): All 13 roles in one place with UK + US median comparison.
- [Software Engineer salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/software-engineer): UK median £60k, US median $130k. Tech-hub premium and company-tier factors detailed.
- [Product Manager salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/product-manager): UK median £65k, US median $140k. Technical-PM premium documented.
- [Data Scientist salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/data-scientist): UK median £60k, US median $130k. ML/research vs analytics split explained.
- [Product Designer salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/product-designer): UK median £55k, US median $120k. IC vs management track tradeoffs.
- [Marketing Manager salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/marketing-manager): UK median £50k, US median $95k. Specialty premiums (growth, performance, demand-gen).
- [Sales Development Rep salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/sales-development-rep): UK OTE £38k, US OTE $75k. Base/variable mix and AE promotion path.
- [Customer Success Manager salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/customer-success-manager): UK OTE £50k, US OTE $95k. Account size and variable-comp factors.
- [Frontend Developer salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/frontend-developer): UK median £58k, US median $125k. Design-engineer premium documented.
- [Backend Developer salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/backend-developer): UK median £65k, US median $140k. Distributed-systems / infra premium.
- [UX Researcher salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/ux-researcher): UK median £55k, US median $130k. Quant vs qual specialty split.
- [DevOps / Platform Engineer salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/devops-engineer): UK median £70k, US median $145k. Platform-team premium.
- [Engineering Manager salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/engineering-manager): UK median £95k, US median $200k. Team size and IC-vs-EM track tradeoffs.
- [Account Executive salary](https://aimvantage.uk/salary/account-executive): UK OTE £75k, US OTE $165k. Enterprise vs SMB segment differences.

## Sample analyses (real, no signup needed)

- [Anthropic Senior PM](https://aimvantage.uk/sample/anthropic-senior-pm): Full prep pack run for a Senior Product Manager role at Anthropic. Fit score, match points, gaps, cover letter (4 tones), 12 mock questions, 6-slide pitch.
- [Stripe Staff PM](https://aimvantage.uk/sample/stripe-staff-pm): Full prep pack for a Staff Product Manager role at Stripe. Calibrated 78/100 fit. Strategic brief covers code-quality bar and writing-as-thinking.
- [OpenAI ML Engineer](https://aimvantage.uk/sample/openai-ml-eng): Full prep pack for a Member of Technical Staff (ML) role at OpenAI. Calibrated 73/100 fit, with explicit gap analysis and closing moves.

## Comparisons and alternatives

- [Compare hub](https://aimvantage.uk/compare): Vantage vs Teal vs Resume.io vs Jobscan side-by-side feature matrix.
- [Alternatives index](https://aimvantage.uk/alternatives): Hub for honest competitor comparisons with pricing, where each tool wins, and where it falls short.
- [Jobscan alternative](https://aimvantage.uk/alternatives/jobscan): Vantage as a Jobscan alternative — full prep pack including fit score for £5 one-time vs $49.95/month.
- [Teal alternative](https://aimvantage.uk/alternatives/teal): Vantage vs Teal — when to use the tracker vs the prep tool. Often used together.
- [Final Round AI alternative](https://aimvantage.uk/alternatives/final-round-ai): Vantage as the ethical alternative — preparation before the interview, not in-call AI cheating.
- [Resume Worded alternative](https://aimvantage.uk/alternatives/resume-worded): Vantage scores your CV against a specific role, not a generic benchmark — plus cover letter and interview prep in the same flow.

## Just laid off?

- [Just Laid Off — Read This First](https://aimvantage.uk/laid-off): A cohort-targeted landing page for the April 2026 tech layoff wave (Oracle 30k, Meta 8k, ASML 1.7k, Snap 1k, Nike 1.4k — ~42,000 newly job-hunting in a single month). Specific advice on the 3 things to fix on a CV before applying.

### Company-specific advice for the April 2026 layoff cohort

- [From Oracle (~30k)](https://aimvantage.uk/laid-off/from/oracle): Oracle alumni — Oracle skills framing, Taleo at next employer, severance/COBRA timing, network leverage.
- [From Meta (~8k, eff. May 20)](https://aimvantage.uk/laid-off/from/meta): Meta alumni — using the May 20 runway, translating Meta-internal acronyms, AI/ML pivot, ex-Meta badge value window.
- [From ASML (~1.7k)](https://aimvantage.uk/laid-off/from/asml): ASML alumni — semiconductor expertise framing, UK redundancy specifics, EU work eligibility leverage, Workday at next employer.
- [From Snap (~1k)](https://aimvantage.uk/laid-off/from/snap): Snap alumni — AR/Lens experience targeting, Gen Z user research framing, equity vesting checks, Greenhouse/Lever at next employer.
- [From Nike (~1.4k)](https://aimvantage.uk/laid-off/from/nike): Nike alumni — brand experience portability, athlete/sponsorship transferable skills, Portland market reality, Workday in retail/CPG.
- [From Cloudflare (~1.1k, May 8 2026)](https://aimvantage.uk/laid-off/from/cloudflare): Cloudflare alumni — agent-era pivot context, CF stack reframes for non-CF employers, severance specifics (16 weeks + RSU acceleration), Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby at next employer.

## ATS Parser Guide

Vendor-specific guides on how each major Applicant Tracking System parses CVs in 2026, with documented quirks and fixes:

- [ATS Guide Hub](https://aimvantage.uk/ats): Overview of how 5 major ATSes read CVs.
- [Workday](https://aimvantage.uk/ats/workday): Reads PDFs in document-stream order. Multi-column CVs get interleaved. Used by ~50% of Fortune 500 enterprises.
- [Greenhouse](https://aimvantage.uk/ats/greenhouse): Strips emoji codepoints. Section detection by exact wording. Used by ~40% of Series B+ tech startups.
- [Lever](https://aimvantage.uk/ats/lever): Historically drops PDF header/footer text. Modern parser. Used by Netflix, Shopify, Quora.
- [Taleo](https://aimvantage.uk/ats/taleo): Oracle-owned legacy parser. Strict on standard section names. Common in financial services and public sector.
- [iCIMS](https://aimvantage.uk/ats/icims): Configuration varies significantly by tenant. Skills extraction is weaker than newer ATSes.
- [SmartRecruiters](https://aimvantage.uk/ats/smartrecruiters): Modern parser with aggressive keyword extraction. Used by Bosch, IKEA, LinkedIn, Visa, McDonald's.
- [SAP SuccessFactors](https://aimvantage.uk/ats/sap-successfactors): Enterprise HCM, strict on section names and date formatting. Common in DACH, Fortune 500, global manufacturing.

## What you get in one analysis

- **Company Intel:** Deep company research — what they do, their tech stack, recent news, culture signals.
- **Tailored Cover Letter:** Four tones to pick from — professional, warm, direct, creative.
- **Mock Interview Questions:** AI-generated likely questions plus an AI-graded mock interview.
- **CV Fit Score:** Match percentage plus the exact gaps to close before the interview.
- **Presentation Outline:** A real 5-minute interview pitch, not a list of bullet points.

## Flagship report (2026 hiring trends, aggregating 34 deep-dives)

- [The State of 2026 Tech Interview Hiring](https://aimvantage.uk/state-of-2026): Aggregated findings from 34 long-form company-specific interview deep-dives published in 2026. Five data findings (AI-thesis filter universal, values rounds underweighted, take-homes returning, open-source signal substitutes for credentials at AI shops, layoff cohort 6-week recruiter-attention window) plus what changed between 2024 and 2026 plus implications for prep. Free to cite with attribution. Source list of 34 underlying deep-dives included.

## Company interview deep-dives (2026, with real recent hiring signals)

Each post covers a specific company's interview process: 5-stage breakdown with realistic timing, 10 likely interview questions drawn from real Glassdoor/team-blog evidence, 3-5 traps that kill candidates at THAT company, and a 90-minute prep checklist.

- [Stripe senior PM interview process 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/stripe-senior-pm-interview-guide-2026): The take-home memo, the writing test, the four traps. Post-Series F AI-first PM hiring shift.
- [Anthropic AI safety interview questions 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/anthropic-ai-safety-interview-questions-2026): Post-Series F + GPT-5 hiring. Safety theatre vs concrete examples — the failure mode that kills strong candidates.
- [Datadog software engineer interview guide 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/datadog-software-engineer-interview-guide-2026): 5-stage process at $3bn ARR, the live-coding bar, the system-design rubric.
- [Revolut product designer interview process 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/revolut-product-designer-interview-process-2026): UK banking-licence era, the design challenge, the bar-raiser interview.
- [OpenAI applied research interview prep 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/openai-applied-research-interview-prep-2026): Post-GPT-5, the model-eval test, the alignment grilling.
- [Cloudflare product manager interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/cloudflare-product-manager-interview-2026): Q1 $639.8M earnings, x402 agent-era pivot, the 1100-layoff aftermath.
- [Figma product designer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/figma-product-designer-interview-2026): Post-IPO ($1.056B revenue), Make/Weave/Buzz launches, the portfolio narrative trap.
- [DeepMind research scientist interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/deepmind-research-scientist-interview-2026): UK union vote, Pentagon contract context, Gemini Safety hiring.
- [Notion software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/notion-software-engineer-interview-2026): Notion 3.0 Agents era, $11B valuation, the systems round.
- [Spotify data scientist interview UK 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/spotify-data-scientist-interview-uk-2026): London office hiring, summer cohort, the experiment-design test.
- [GitLab staff engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/gitlab-staff-engineer-interview-2026): All-remote async loop, Duo + Agent Platform context, the written communication filter.
- [Linear product engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/linear-product-engineer-interview-2026): Craft-first take-home, the taste signal, why fast-and-rough fails.
- [Vercel software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/vercel-software-engineer-interview-2026): v0 + Next.js 15 + AI SDK product depth, the "have you built with the stack" filter.
- [Klarna software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/klarna-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-IPO (Sep 2025), AI-first restructure, the payments domain reasoning filter.
- [Canva product manager interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/canva-product-manager-interview-2026): 230M users, Magic Studio + Affinity, the values round nobody preps for.
- [Airtable product engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/airtable-product-engineer-interview-2026): Cobuilder + AI agent platform pivot, the user-facing AI feature filter.
- [Monzo software engineer interview UK 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/monzo-software-engineer-interview-uk-2026): IPO-track context, 2,800+ microservices, the values round nobody preps for.
- [Wise software engineer interview UK 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/wise-software-engineer-interview-uk-2026): LSE-listed, GBP 100B+ in cross-border payments, the corridor reasoning filter.
- [Octopus Energy / Kraken software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/octopus-energy-kraken-software-engineer-interview-2026): Climate-tech mission filter, pragmatic Python culture, grid-flex tariffs.
- [Apple software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/apple-software-engineer-interview-2026): Team-match phase, the silent filter, lunch-round signal weight.
- [Microsoft product manager interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/microsoft-product-manager-interview-2026): Copilot-everywhere thesis, enterprise PM bar, Satya-era values.
- [Amazon SDE interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/amazon-sde-interview-2026): Leadership principles still rule, bar-raiser veto, anti-rehearsed-STAR drill.
- [Snowflake software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/snowflake-software-engineer-interview-2026): Cortex AI pivot, AI-on-warehouse trade-offs, Iceberg context.
- [Databricks software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/databricks-software-engineer-interview-2026): Lakehouse + Mosaic AI, both-sides-of-the-debate filter, IPO-track rigour.
- [Hugging Face ML engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/hugging-face-ml-engineer-interview-2026): Open-source-first hiring, public contribution signal as the silent filter.
- [Shopify software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/shopify-software-engineer-interview-2026): AI-first directive (Lutke memo), Life Story round, commerce-shaped systems.
- [Atlassian software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/atlassian-software-engineer-interview-2026): Rovo AI agent platform, multi-product context, values round register.
- [ServiceNow software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/servicenow-software-engineer-interview-2026): Now Assist + regulated enterprise AI, multi-tenant platform reasoning.
- [Cursor (Anysphere) engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/cursor-engineer-interview-2026): The interview happens IN Cursor; daily-usage filter; small-team velocity register.
- [Replit engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/replit-engineer-interview-2026): Replit Agent pivot, multi-tenant container reasoning, agent-first workflow filter.
- [Modal engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/modal-engineer-interview-2026): Hardcore systems shop; built-vs-used filter; billing-accuracy register; GPU bin-packing.
- [Mistral AI engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/mistral-ai-engineer-interview-2026): European-AI strategic context, open-vs-closed-weights register, Paris HQ.
- [xAI engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/xai-engineer-interview-2026): Move-fast operating tempo, Colossus distributed training depth, founders round.
- [Perplexity engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/perplexity-engineer-interview-2026): Retrieval-vs-generation joint optimisation, time-to-first-token budgets, threading model.
- [Google software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/google-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Gemini system design bar, hiring committee + team match dual gate, Googleyness rubric.
- [Meta software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/meta-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-April-layoff AI pivot, IC4+ system design with AI angle, real Meta-stack reasoning expected.
- [Salesforce engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/salesforce-engineer-interview-2026): Agentforce + multi-tenant platform reasoning at Fortune 500 scale, Ohana values round.
- [Tesla software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/tesla-software-engineer-interview-2026): FSD-era systems depth, real-time perception-to-planning latency budgets, founders-round directness.
- [Netflix software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/netflix-software-engineer-interview-2026): Senior-only hiring, Keeper Test framing, no-management-needed autonomy stories.
- [Coinbase software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/coinbase-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-correction efficiency mandate, blockchain reasoning at production scale, regulatory awareness.
- [Adobe software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/adobe-software-engineer-interview-2026): GenAI-pivot register, Firefly + Express daily-usage filter, commercial-safe AI training-data position.
- [Uber software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/uber-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-2024 profitability mandate, marketplace reasoning, A/B-test framing of every feature story.
- [Booking.com software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/booking-com-software-engineer-interview-2026): Famously data-driven culture, every story needs A/B-tested outcome, Amsterdam-HQ relocation expectation.
- [IBM software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/ibm-software-engineer-interview-2026): watsonx + Granite open-weight strategy, Red Hat heritage, regulated-industry constraints, team-specific prep.
- [Reddit software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/reddit-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-IPO efficiency mandate, AI-training-data licensing strategy, community-platform reasoning.
- [Plaid software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/plaid-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Section-1033 open-finance landscape, fintech-API depth, regulatory-aware system design.
- [Goldman Sachs Engineering interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/goldman-sachs-engineering-interview-2026): SLANG proprietary stack heritage, Marquee API platform, post-Apple-Card GS Bank context, formal investment-bank register.
- [Jane Street software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/jane-street-software-engineer-interview-2026): OCaml-heavy stack, brain-teaser + probability tradition, market-making simulation, $400k+ first-year comp.
- [Bloomberg software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/bloomberg-software-engineer-interview-2026): Terminal platform paradigm, B-PIPE distribution at scale, AI-augmented news integration, real-time microsecond systems.
- [Nvidia software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/nvidia-software-engineer-interview-2026): Real CUDA / GPU-systems depth (not just PyTorch), Blackwell memory hierarchy, hardware-software co-design moat, AMD MI300X / TPU competitive context.
- [Arm software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/arm-software-engineer-interview-2026): Cambridge HQ, Cortex-X / Neoverse architecture, post-IPO + AI-pivot context, Apple-silicon competitive impact, licensing-business engineering trade-offs.
- [TikTok / ByteDance software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/tiktok-bytedance-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-divestiture US regulatory context, recommendation-systems depth, extreme ship velocity (A/B tests in hours not weeks).
- [Sentry software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/sentry-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Codecov platform expansion, open-source-meets-commercial dual register, observability event-processing depth.
- [Roblox software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/roblox-software-engineer-interview-2026): UGC platform at 80M+ DAU, child-safety regulatory context (COPPA / GDPR-K / Ofcom), AI-creator pivot trade-offs.
- [Twilio software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/twilio-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Segment-divestiture AI-CX focus, carrier-integration depth across 180 countries, communications compliance (TCPA / GDPR / A2P 10DLC).
- [Block (Square / Cash App) software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/block-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-2024 ecosystem-restructure, payments-systems depth, calibrated take on the Bitcoin bet, regulatory awareness (PCI-DSS / BSA / AML).
- [Discord software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/discord-software-engineer-interview-2026): IPO-track timeline, real-time-systems depth (Elixir/Erlang), moderator-first community-platform reasoning, AI-moderation thesis.
- [Pinterest software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/pinterest-software-engineer-interview-2026): Visual-ML depth (image embeddings, multimodal retrieval), Home Feed ranking, post-Bill-Ready shopping thesis.
- [DoorDash software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/doordash-software-engineer-interview-2026): Three-sided marketplace (consumer / merchant / dasher), real-time logistics + dispatch at city-block resolution, broader-retail (DashMart + Wolt) expansion.
- [Workday software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/workday-software-engineer-interview-2026): Multi-tenant enterprise platform (50% of Fortune 500), proprietary OMS, Illuminate AI strategy in regulated HR (EEOC, GDPR Article 22, NYC Local Law 144).
- [Etsy software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/etsy-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Reverb-divestiture handmade-marketplace refocus, PHP/Hack legacy + Java migration, AI-for-sellers tools, small-seller-economy framing.
- [Lyft software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/lyft-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Uber-divergence US-only rideshare + bikes/scooters refocus, marketplace + real-time-dispatch depth, AV partnership stance (killed L5 in 2021), focus-not-scope strategy.
- [Slack software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/slack-software-engineer-interview-2026): Salesforce-subsidiary register, real-time messaging at scale, Slack-AI + Agentforce integration, enterprise-grid + compliance scope, post-acquisition platform expectations.
- [MongoDB software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/mongodb-software-engineer-interview-2026): Document-database + Atlas (multi-cloud DBaaS), vector-search + RAG positioning, distributed-systems depth (replica sets, sharding), C++/Go internals vs Atlas control plane.
- [Reddit software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/reddit-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-IPO community + ads + AI-data-licensing context, comment-tree at petabyte scale, 2023 API protest context, volunteer-moderator dynamic.
- [Snowflake software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/snowflake-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-AI-Data-Cloud pivot, Cortex AI + Arctic LLM + Iceberg-native lakehouse, distributed query-engine depth, Databricks competitive register.
- [Datadog software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/datadog-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-observability + Cloud SIEM + Bits AI platform expansion, petabyte ingest + time-series depth, OpenTelemetry tension, platform-vs-point-tool register.
- [Cloudflare software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/cloudflare-software-engineer-interview-2026): Edge + Workers + R2 + Workers AI + Hyperdrive dev-platform pivot, anycast + V8-isolate runtime depth, AWS-replacement thesis.
- [HubSpot software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/hubspot-software-engineer-interview-2026): Smart CRM unification + Breeze AI agents across 5 Hubs, SMB-product register, HEART Culture Code interview register.
- [Atlassian software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/atlassian-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Server-EOL Cloud-only + Loom integration + Rovo cross-product agents, multi-tenant + permission-boundary depth, Atlassian values.
- [Coinbase software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/coinbase-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Base L2 + onchain platform pivot, USDC + x402 agentic payments, regulated-fintech + post-SEC-litigation register.
- [Robinhood software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/robinhood-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Bitstamp + Robinhood Legend + 24/5 stocks + futures, regulated retail brokerage depth, post-meme-stock register.
- [Plaid software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/plaid-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-CFPB Section 1033 open-banking pivot, 10K+ institution integration reality, Layer + Signal + Identity network thesis.
- [OpenAI software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/openai-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-GPT-5 + Agents SDK + Sora-2, inference at planetary scale (KV-cache, speculative decoding), safety / commercial-product register.
- [Anthropic software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/anthropic-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Claude-4 + Computer Use + MCP + Claude Code, Constitutional AI + Responsible Scaling Policy register, multi-region inference.
- [Databricks software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/databricks-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-MosaicML + Unity Catalog + Genie lakehouse-AI thesis, Photon + Delta + DBRX, Snowflake competitive register.
- [Salesforce software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/salesforce-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Agentforce + Data Cloud + Einstein, multi-tenant Apex + governor limits + Hyperforce, AppExchange platform thesis, Ohana culture register.
- [ServiceNow software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/servicenow-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Now Assist + AI Agents + Workflow Data Fabric, Now Platform multi-tenant runtime, Fortune-500 enterprise-trust register.
- [Zoom software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/zoom-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-AI Companion + Workplace + Workvivo + Phone pivot, SFU + simulcast + SVC real-time media depth, post-pandemic AI-first thesis.
- [AMD software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/amd-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-MI300X + ROCm 7 + Pensando + Xilinx, GPU + compiler depth, open-source ROCm-vs-CUDA register, Nvidia-competitive thesis.
- [Intel software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/intel-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Gaudi 3 + Lunar Lake + IDM 2.0 + Foundry, x86 + Gaudi + oneAPI + NPU depth, post-Gelsinger restructure register.
- [Cisco software engineer interview 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/cisco-software-engineer-interview-2026): Post-Splunk acquisition + AI Networking + Hypershield, Silicon One + NX-OS + IOS XR networking depth, enterprise-customer register.

## Blog (long-form guides)

- [Just laid off in April 2026? The 3 things to fix in your CV before you apply](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/just-laid-off-april-2026-cv-fix): Specific advice for tech employees laid off in the April 2026 wave. ATS parser checks, formatting strip-down, exact-match keyword tuning.
- [Oracle, Meta, ASML, Snap, Nike: a layoff-week CV checklist](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/oracle-meta-asml-layoff-cv-checklist): A 5-step week-one checklist for tech employees laid off in April/May 2026. CV format, ATS parse, recruiter outreach, interview prep, LinkedIn moves.
- [How to prep for any job interview in 20 minutes](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/how-to-prep-for-any-interview-in-20-minutes): A concrete 20-minute manual routine used by people applying to 50+ jobs a week. Markdown: /blog/how-to-prep-for-any-interview-in-20-minutes.md
- [What ATS screening software actually checks in 2026](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/what-ats-actually-checks-in-2026): Plain-English breakdown of how modern applicant tracking systems parse CVs. Markdown: /blog/what-ats-actually-checks-in-2026.md
- [The 4 cover letter tones, and when each one wins](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/the-4-cover-letter-tones-and-when-to-use-each): When to use Professional vs Warm vs Direct vs Creative, with the rule for picking. Markdown: /blog/the-4-cover-letter-tones-and-when-to-use-each.md
- [How to use ChatGPT to prep for an interview (without sounding like a bot)](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/how-to-use-chatgpt-to-prep-for-an-interview): Six-prompt workflow with exact prompts and the rules for keeping output human. Markdown: /blog/how-to-use-chatgpt-to-prep-for-an-interview.md
- [The 30-second CV review test recruiters actually run](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/the-30-second-cv-review-recruiters-actually-run): The four checkpoints recruiters scan in 30 seconds, what kills you, and the 5-minute fix. Markdown: /blog/the-30-second-cv-review-recruiters-actually-run.md
- [The 5-minute interview pitch that gets you remembered](https://aimvantage.uk/blog/the-5-minute-interview-pitch-that-gets-you-remembered): The 5-block pitch structure (origin, expertise, why-now, why-them, ask) plus the 90-second compression. Markdown: /blog/the-5-minute-interview-pitch-that-gets-you-remembered.md

## Interview prep packs by company

Company-specific interview prep packs. Each one has the company's signature interview pattern, 12 likely questions, 5 prep steps, common mistakes, and FAQ. Schema-tagged FAQPage + Article.

- [Google](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/google) — committee model, Googleyness rubric, Google-Docs-not-IDE coding
- [Meta](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/meta) — coding-heavy, fast-paced, impact-focused behavioural
- [Amazon](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/amazon) — Leadership Principles rubric, STAR-format expected
- [Microsoft](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/microsoft) — five-round loop, growth-mindset rubric, deep-dive technical
- [OpenAI](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/openai) — paid take-homes, mission-fit judgement, ML / systems depth
- [Anthropic](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/anthropic) — paid take-homes, RSP / safety judgement, alignment depth
- [Apple](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/apple) — design-quality bar, on-site multi-team panels
- [Netflix](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/netflix) — keeper test culture, senior-only hiring
- [Tesla](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/tesla) — first-principles, hardware-software, fast hiring-manager-decides
- [Salesforce](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/salesforce) — Ohana values, multi-tenant SaaS depth
- [Uber](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/uber) — owner / doer rubric, marketplace system design, Operations case format
- [DoorDash](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/doordash) — SQL screen, three-user-group framework, marketplace dispatch
- [Spotify](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/spotify) — paid take-home, Squad model, cross-functional weighting
- [Snowflake](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/snowflake) — SQL fluency required, multi-tenant data-warehouse depth, "Put customers first" rubric
- [Databricks](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/databricks) — Spark / lakehouse depth, "Truth seeking" rubric, Mosaic AI org distinction
- [Stripe](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/stripe) — long take-homes, code-quality bar, writing emphasis
- [Shopify](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/shopify) — Ruby ecosystem comfort, "trust the team" culture
- [Airbnb](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/airbnb) — design-systems thinking, host/guest empathy
- [McKinsey](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/mckinsey) — case interview format, structured problem-solving
- [Goldman Sachs](https://aimvantage.uk/interview-prep/goldman-sachs) — Superday format, technical + behavioural depth

Role-specific question + prep packs. Each one has 12 most-asked questions, a 5-step prep routine, common mistakes, and FAQ.

## Press

- [Press kit](https://aimvantage.uk/press): Founder bio, company facts, brand assets, story angles, and direct contact for journalists and analysts. Direct line: giovanni.sizino.ennes@hotmail.co.uk

## Developer / Agent ecosystem

- [Skills directory](https://aimvantage.uk/skills): Curated list of MCP servers and Claude Skills that pair with Vantage's job-application workflow. Includes cv-mirror-mcp (open-source, MIT), filesystem-mcp, github-mcp, brave-search-mcp.
- [API documentation](https://aimvantage.uk/docs/api): Public API for the Vantage analysis engine. Endpoints: /analyze (1 token), /rewrite-tone (1 token), /interview/questions (1 token), /interview/evaluate (free), /credits. Currently in preview — request access via email.

## Optional

- [Full product context](https://aimvantage.uk/llms-full.txt): Extended description, FAQ, feature detail, and roadmap for LLM crawlers and AI assistants.
